texto: Sometimes the emptiness in a room becomes palpable as if you could reach out and touch it real, hear its silence, feel its black nothingness. It invades your spirit, your soul like a stealthy misperception; a liquid lie that whispers and will not die, and makes you fight to stay alive.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Gloria Smith: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Sometimes the emptiness in a room becomes palpable as if you could reach out and touch it real, h…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que fe, depression, lonely pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao-noturna e lonely.

It invades your spirit, your soul like a stealthy misperception; a liquid lie that whispers and will not die, and makes you fight to stay alive.

texto: Got to go sing in a few minutes... no, that's GOT to go sing in a few minutes, as in... GOT TO GO SING in a few minutes... hahaha It's an all consuming compassion/obsession... a drawing... a wonderful bliss... a union of soul and spirit, of notes and voice, of all of life's vibrating essence. String theory... all of life is vibrating, is alive, and the life of that essence is music itself!!
explicacao: Citação de Gloria Smith sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Got to go sing in a few minutes... no, that's GOT to go sing in a few minutes, as in... GOT TO GO…” articula reflexao, music, minutes em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

texto: My mind begs for you in the soft, secret, silent places of the night... I thirst for you and without you my soul is a desert. I thought when I first met you, first saw you, that I loved you more than any woman had ever loved a man, but now I know the feeling only grows within me. You are the song I sing each day, each moment, each second. You are the melody of my life...
explicacao: Citação de Gloria Smith sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “My mind begs for you in the soft, secret, silent places of the night... I thirst for you and with…” articula reflexao, love, music em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
